permissions.edit_articles: Edit and moderate any wiki article

index_layout.heading: Wiki home page
index_layout.intro: Compose what the /wiki landing page shows using shortcodes. Leave blank to list all articles.
index_layout.label: Home page layout
index_layout.help: Each shortcode goes on its own line. Lines that are not shortcodes are shown as text; lines starting with #, ## or ### become headings.
index_layout.shortcode_articles_cat: List a category (by slug or id), optionally limited to N most-recent. Add title="…" for a heading.
index_layout.shortcode_article: Link a single article by id.

categories.heading: Wiki categories
categories.intro: Create and organize the categories articles can be filed under.
categories.empty: No categories yet. Create one to get started.
categories.delete_confirm_named: Delete the category “{name}”? Articles in it will become uncategorized.

category_editor.field_slug_help: Used in the category's URL. Leave blank to generate it from the name.
category_editor.field_color_help: Hex color (e.g. #3b82f6) used for the category's badge.
category_editor.field_icon_help: A Font Awesome class, e.g. fas fa-book.
category_editor.field_position_help: Categories are ordered by this value, lowest first.
category_editor.error_save: Couldn't save the category. Please check the fields and try again.

index.empty_own: No articles yet. Click "New article" to write one.

compose.title: New article
compose.body_placeholder: Write the article. Markdown is supported.
compose.discard_confirm: You have an unsaved article. Discard it?

show.deleted_notice: This article is deleted. Only editors can see it.

comments.heading: Comments ({count})
comments.discard_confirm: You have an unsubmitted comment. Discard it?
comments.confirm_delete_forever: Permanently delete this comment? This cannot be undone.

confirm.soft_delete: Delete this article? Editors can restore it later.
confirm.delete_forever: Permanently delete this article and its history? This cannot be undone.

errors.load_article: Could not load this article. It may have been deleted, or you may not have permission to view it.
errors.empty_body: Please write the article body before submitting.
errors.delete_article_forever: Could not permanently delete the article.
errors.upload_no_files: Upload returned no files. Please try again.

api.article_soft_delete_first: An article must be deleted before it can be permanently removed.
api.comment_soft_delete_first: A comment must be deleted before it can be permanently removed.
